utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 top-level items. Now check each for completeness: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – OK. 2) travel_dates: provided as specific dates – OK. 3) transportation: includes flights with route and cost, but lacks specific flight details (airline, times, numbers) though the format only says “flight details with costs”; arguably minimally acceptable. Local transportation with cost also included – OK. 4) accommodation: hotel selection, cost, nights – OK. 5) activities: provided themes and a potential workshop but no costs; the format requires selected activities with costs – NOT OK. 6) additional_services: extra services listed (restaurants and locations) but no costs; the format requires any extra services with costs – NOT OK. 7) total_budget: shows total_cost and buffer_remaining but not a complete cost breakdown itemizing components; the format requires a complete breakdown – likely NOT OK. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (borderline but includes cost), accommodation. Items not fully specified: activities, additional_services, total_budget. That makes 4/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which appears in the destinations list with a rating. Accommodation lists 'Artistic Abode Hotel' which corresponds to 'Artistic Abode' in the accommodation ratings. Transportation specifies a budget-style flight price (€100) but no explicit airline class name; therefore, only items explicitly named in the final package that match ground-truth item names can be mapped. Activities list general themes and a workshop not present in the ground-truth items, and restaurants list specific venues not in the ground-truth restaurant categories. Thus, only 'Prague, Czech Republic' and 'Artistic Abode' can be mapped.
